response.justification: Bogdan has roughly 20 years of software engineering experience and genuine breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, but the profile falls well short of the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) bar. His AI exposure is limited to approximately 13 months at his current role and is positioned at the infrastructure/tooling layer (MCP generators, agentic workflow support), not at the level of strategic product ownership or recognized thought leadership in AI. There is no evidence of director-level scope, customer advisory work, cloud platform strategy, or the kind of demonstrated AI-powered product delivery the role requires. His seniority ceiling to date appears to be Staff Engineer in an execution capacity, not a director-level IC shaping AI strategy across an organization.
strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) satisfies the baseline tenure requirement
Hands-on involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq signals growing engagement with agentic AI patterns
Demonstrated entrepreneurial instinct through GISCollective (open-source geo-platform) and a track record of community knowledge-sharing via workshops and conference talks
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related technical field; holds a BS in CS and an unrelated fine arts degree, missing the preferred academic credential signal for this seniority
AI depth is shallow and very recent: ~13 months of supporting AI infrastructure work, with no demonstrated AI-powered products shipped at scale or recognized external expertise
No evidence of director-level scope, strategic customer advisory, cloud platform strategy ownership, or the organizational influence expected at a Principal/Director IC level
